Name: departments_by_pk
SQL: SELECT "_subs"."result_id", "_fld_resp"."root" AS "result" FROM UNNEST($1::text[], $2::json[]) AS "_subs"("result_id", "result_vars") LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT json_build_object('departments_by_pk', (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "public"."departments"."id" = $3::uuid LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.base"."name" AS "name", "_root.r.employees"."employees" AS "employees") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root.r.employees"), '[]') AS "employees" FROM (WITH "_root.r.employees.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."user_departments" WHERE "public"."user_departments"."is_active" = $4::bool AND "department_id" = "_root.base"."id") SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.employees.base"."user_id" AS "user_id", "_root.r.employees.base"."role" AS "role") AS "_e")) AS "_root.r.employees" FROM "_root.r.employees.base") AS "_root.r.employees") AS "_root.r.employees" ON ('true'))) AS "root") AS "_fld_resp" ON ('true')
